description: Patient rooms must provide a minimum 60-inch diameter turning circle for wheelchair accessibility, exclusive of fixed elements.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 805.4

description: Waiting areas must provide accessible seating with minimum 30 x 48-inch clear floor space adjacent to each accessible seat.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 802

description: Accessible routes in healthcare facilities must maintain a minimum clear width of 36 inches (3 feet), with 44 inches recommended for patient transport.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 403.5

description: Nurse stations and reception areas must provide a portion of the counter with a maximum height of 36 inches and knee clearance.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 904.4

description: ICU patient bays must provide accessible routes to each bed position, including maneuvering clearance at the foot of the bed.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 805

description: Pharmacy dispensing windows and counters must include an accessible service counter at maximum 36 inches height.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 904.4

description: Laboratory work areas must provide at least 5% of workstations as accessible, with knee clearance and reach range compliance.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 902

description: Imaging rooms (MRI, CT, X-ray) must provide accessible patient transfer clearance of at least 60 inches on one side of the imaging table.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 805

description: Operating rooms must maintain accessible routes for staff with disabilities, including maneuvering clearance at all workstations.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 206.2

description: Emergency department treatment rooms must have accessible routes with minimum 5ft x 5ft turning space for wheelchair accessibility.
citation: ADA Standards for Accessible Design, Section 805.4
